title: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing Evil Dave

startPoint.en: Inspect Evil Dave in the banquet hall in Lumbridge Castle.
startPoint.es: Inspecciona a Evil Dave en el salón de banquetes de Lumbridge Castle.

quests: Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest

items.name: Wily cat
items.display: Wily cat, cat, kitten, or lazy cat Overgrown cats won't work as they do not hunt rats A kitten is not recommended as the chance of them catching a rat is a low 15% compared to 50% for a normal cat, and will take longer to complete

items.name: Overgrown cat
items.display: Overgrown cats won't work as they do not hunt rats

items.name: A kitten is not recommended as the chance of them catching a rat is a low 15% compared to 50% for a normal cat, and will take longer to complete
items.display: A kitten is not recommended as the chance of them catching a rat is a low 15% compared to 50% for a normal cat, and will take longer to complete

items.name: Stew
items.display: Up to 10 bowls of stew (If you make no mistakes, you will not need more than 10 bowls. The Forester's Arms sells stew for 20 coins).

rewards.name: Hellrat
rewards.display: The ability to catch hellrats to get a hellcat

rewards.name: Spicy stew
rewards.display: The ability to add coloured spices to stew by catching Hellrats (spicy stews can boost or lower certain stats)

text.en: Inspect Evil Dave inside Lumbridge Castle Banquet Hall.
text.es: Inspecciona a Evil Dave dentro del salón de banquetes de Lumbridge Castle.

text.en: West of Edgeville's bank, talk to Doris. (opciones de chat: 1 Is Dave in? • 1 Yes, I'm evil!)
text.es: Al oeste del banco de Edgeville, habla con Doris. (opciones de chat: 1 ¿Está Dave? • 1 ¡Sí, soy malvado!)
Dirígete al sótano de la casa.

text.en: Talk to Evil Dave. (opciones de chat: 2 General chat • 3 What did you eat at the secret council meeting? • 4 You've got to tell me because the magic requires it!)
text.es: Habla con Evil Dave. (opciones de chat: 2 Charla general • 3 ¿Qué comiste en la reunión secreta del consejo? • 4 ¡Tienes que decírmelo porque la magia lo requiere!)

text.en: Return to Doris. If you miss this step, the hellrats will only drop ashes.
text.es: Vuelve con Doris. Si te saltas este paso, las hellrats solo soltarán cenizas.

text.en: Head back in the basement, interact with your cat and select "Chase-Vermin". (Switch off 'Hide Familiar Options' in Gameplay->Combat & Action Bar-> 'Choose Option' Menu)
text.es: Vuelve al sótano, interactúa con tu gato y selecciona "Chase-Vermin". (Desactiva 'Hide Familiar Options' en Gameplay->Combat & Action Bar-> menú 'Choose Option')

text.en: As your cat catches the rats, pick up the spices that drop.
text.es: Mientras tu gato caza las ratas, recoge las especias que suelten.

text.en: Do so until at least six doses of each of the four spices are collected.
text.es: Hazlo hasta reunir al menos seis dosis de cada una de las cuatro especias.

text.en: Make Dave's Evil stew by combining doses of each spice on the stews.
text.es: Prepara el Dave's Evil stew combinando dosis de cada especia en los stews.

text.en: After determining the right combination, have Evil Dave taste it and finish the dialogue. This won't consume the stew.
text.es: Tras determinar la combinación correcta, haz que Evil Dave lo pruebe y termina el diálogo. Esto no consumirá el stew.

text.en: Head to Lumbridge and give Evil Dave the stew.
text.es: Dirígete a Lumbridge y dale el stew a Evil Dave.
